enriched_points.expanded_content: LSPR enables highly sensitive, label-free detection of molecular interactions at surfaces, enhancing imaging capabilities in biomedical research and diagnostics.
This technique enhances imaging by illuminating samples at an oblique angle, allowing detection of LSPR signals from nanoparticles, crucial for studying biological samples.
Prism-based approaches facilitate LSPR sensing by enabling precise angle adjustments for optimal light coupling, improving image resolution and detection limits in imaging applications.
LSPR techniques offer affordable diagnostic options, making advanced imaging accessible for routine health screenings, thereby improving patient outcomes and healthcare efficiency.
